title: [PrepareForEmission] Crash when inout operations are passed to instance ports
body:
```mlir
hw.module @TopXMRAsserts(%I: !hw.inout<i1>) -> () {}
hw.module @Top() -> () {
    %I = sv.wire : !hw.inout<i1>
    hw.instance "TopXMRAsserts_inst0" sym @Top.TopXMRAsserts_inst0 @TopXMRAsserts(I: %I: !hw.inout<i1>) -> () {doNotPrint = 1}
}
sv.bind #hw.innerNameRef<@Top::@Top.TopXMRAsserts_inst0>
```
`circt-opt -export-verilog`:
```
circt-opt: /home/uenoku/dev/circt/llvm/llvm/../mlir/include/mlir/IR/StorageUniquerSupport.h:153: static ConcreteT mlir::detail::StorageUserBase<circt::hw::InOutType, mlir::Type, circt::hw::detail::InOutTypeStorage, mlir::detail::TypeUniquer>::get(mlir::MLIRContext *, Args...) [ConcreteT = circt::hw::InOutType, BaseT = mlir::Type, StorageT = circt::hw::detail::InOutTypeStorage, UniquerT = mlir::detail::TypeUniquer, Traits = <>, Args = <mlir::Type>]: Assertion `succeeded(ConcreteT::verify(getDefaultDiagnosticEmitFn(ctx), args...))' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace.
```
